scripts.package:release: rm -rf release && mkdir -p release/kiel-univis-courses release/kiel-univis-mcp && npm run build:plugin && npm run build && cp dist/index.mjs manifest.json release/kiel-univis-courses/ && cp dist/mcp.mjs package.json README.md release/kiel-univis-mcp/ && cd release && zip -rq kiel-univis-courses.zip kiel-univis-courses && zip -rq kiel-univis-mcp.zip kiel-univis-mcp
